'''Ord Sedra''' was originally an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] located in the [[Clacis sector/Legends|Clacis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Ord Sedra was colonized by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] sometime before the [[Pius Dea Era]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

It was an [[Imperial Remnant]] planet [[Battle of Ord Sedra|liberated]] from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] by the combined efforts of [[Kyle Katarn]], [[Jan Ors]], and Imperial Remnant troops under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Pallin]].<ref name="E&O" /> After the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Katarn returned to the world, finding clues that led him to believe the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] survived in the [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|Cloak of the Sith]].<ref name="TDFS">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The planet's name was derived from the real world planetoid [[Wikipedia:90377 Sedna|Sedna]], which was discovered in November 2003, just a few months before the writer of ''[[Equals & Opposites|Equals and Opposites]]'' was offered the job.<ref name="ChronoRadio">''[http://www.starwarsfanworks.com/chronoradio/crse2.html ChronoRadio: Special Edition II: The Making of a Tale]'' (48:38)</ref>
